generatedFrom: External AI single-page curation approved for repo import on 2026-03-20

targets.name: Single-page video obstruction sample 01 (xHamster)

notes: Single video detail page selected for player-adjacent ad interference testing.
Use related or recommended cards to probe popup and redirect behavior.

reproSteps: Open the page and wait for the primary player and related content to settle.
Capture the player region, related cards, and any player-adjacent CTA modules.
Click a related or recommended card and observe popup, redirect, or click interception behavior.

targets.name: Single-page video obstruction sample 02 (XVIDEOS)

notes: Single video detail page with premium and remove-ads UI near the playback region.
Useful for separating player chrome from adjacent ad or upsell controls.

reproSteps: Open the page and wait for the title block, player, and below-player controls to render.
Record player-adjacent CTA modules before any click interaction.
Probe premium, remove-ads, or external CTA elements and observe navigation side effects.

targets.name: Single-page content obstruction sample 03 (Javboys OAV754)

notes: Single content page selected for mixed overlay and related-cluster testing.
Search overlay and dynamic interference may require desktop viewport, adblock disabled, and 1-3 reloads.

reproSteps: Open the page with a desktop viewport and allow dynamic UI to settle.
Trigger any search or overlay affordance and inspect whether it covers the main content region.
Compare the main content block against related post clusters to detect false positives.

targets.name: Single-page content obstruction sample 04 (Javboys FC2-PPV-2728492)

notes: Cleaner regression candidate for overlay and related-cluster separation.
Useful as a lower-noise companion target for the other Javboys page.

reproSteps: Open the page and wait for the content block and related content area to render.
Trigger any search overlay affordance if available.
Check whether overlay and related-card regions are distinguished from the main content area.

targets.name: Single-page video obstruction sample 05 (EPORNER)

notes: Single video detail page with player-adjacent CTA modules and scene switching.
Good for checking whether non-player CTA modules leak into player-region heuristics.

reproSteps: Open the page and wait for the player, scene switcher, and top CTA modules to render.
Capture the player region before interacting with any CTA or scene control.
Probe scene thumbnails and nearby CTA modules for redirect or focus-stealing behavior.
